creator: david@wmol.com
text:
/usr/src/contrib/ipfilter/NAT.FreeBSD does not reflect the new way of enabling NAT on FreeBSD.
FreeBSD 4.x added ipfilter (ipf and ipnat) configuration settings to rc.conf
and should be used that way.

Fix: 

Add the new way of starting and enabling NAT on FreeBSD
How-To-Repeat: read /usr/src/contrib/ipfilter/NAT.FreeBSD
